runTitle: Vercel Production Targeted QA - Artifact Short Keyword Pair v8.11.82
coveredSurfaces: /dashboard: AI sidebar opens from production dashboard
AI sidebar short keyword query: '장애보고서' called /api/ai/incident-report and rendered Incident Report artifact card
Incident artifact card rendered affected server, recommendation, anomaly signal, MD/TXT downloads, and fullscreen handoff action
AI sidebar short keyword query: '장애 예측 추세 분석' called /api/ai/intelligent-monitoring and rendered Monitoring Analysis artifact card
Monitoring artifact card rendered analyzed server count, risk signal count, source metadata, evidence, MD/JSON downloads, and fullscreen handoff action
skippedSurfaces: General streaming chat: unchanged by this supplementary keyword routing QA
Guidance/non-execution prompts: covered by local intent regression tests and QA-20260502-0390
Abort/stop in-flight artifact: covered by unit tests because production artifact responses completed quickly
Modal/detail pack: unchanged by artifact keyword routing
Cloud Run admin observability /monitoring and /monitoring/traces: not part of Vercel artifact routing scope

expertAssessments.rationale: Production browser QA covered both representative short keyword families: incident report and failure prediction/trend analysis.
The production evidence complements the local classifier regression suite by verifying UI input, routing, network calls, and artifact rendering.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period effective 0.6724 USD and billed 0.0000 USD after supplementary production keyword QA.

artifacts.label: Artifact short keyword pair production verification

notes: Network requests captured: POST /api/ai/incident-report => 200 and POST /api/ai/intelligent-monitoring => 200.
